The first table on tumorigenesis-related processes lists various protein symbols across five categories: carbohydrate and lipid
metabolism, apoptosis, growth and proliferation, cell cycle, and hypoxia. In carbohydrate and lipid metabolism, the proteins are
ACAA2, ACADM, ACAT1, AC02, ACSF2, ACY1, AKR1A1, ALDH2, ALDH4A1, ALDH6A1, ALDOA, ALDOB, ASS1,
ATP5A1, BDH2, BHMT, CAT, CNDP2, DDC, ECHS1, ENO1, ETFB, FBP1, GAPDH, GATM, GOT2, GPD1, HADH, HSP27,
IDH2, K4, KHK, LDHA, LDHB, MDH2, PCK2, PGK1, SORD, TP5B, TPI1; apoptosis includes ACAA2, ANXA2, ANXA4,
ANXA5, CRYAB, CTSB, CYCS, ENO1, GAPDH, HSP27, HSPE1, LDHA, MIF, SELENBP1, SPD1; growth and proliferation
features CAT, ENO1, FBP1, HNRNPA2B1, HSP27, HSPE1, LDHA, MIF, PRDX3, SELENBP1, SPD1; cell cycle is
represented by ENO1, HSP27, HSPE1, MIF; and hypoxia includes ENO1, HSP27, LDHA. The second table on offspring and
parent exams shows values for offspring exams o2, o3, o4, and o5 across parent exams pi2, pi3, pi4, and pi5: o2 has 0.39 ±
